info.title: AT Protocol XRPC API

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's scrobble mirror sources (Last.fm, ListenBrainz, Teal.fm).

post.summary: Upsert a mirror source for the authenticated user. Toggling `enabled` notifies the mirror process over NATS so it can start/stop the per-user task without a restart.

enabled.description: Enable or disable mirroring for this provider.

externalUsername.description: External username (Last.fm / ListenBrainz). Required when enabling those providers. Ignored for Teal.fm.

apiKey.description: API key / token to be encrypted at rest. Omit to leave the existing key unchanged. Pass an empty string to clear it.

app.rocksky.graph.defs.notFoundActor.description: indicates that a handle or DID could not be resolved

following.description: if the actor follows this DID, this is the AT-URI of the follow record

followedBy.description: if the actor is followed by this DID, contains the AT-URI of the follow record

createdAt.description: The date when the like was created.

enabled.description: Whether scrobbles from this source are being mirrored into Rocksky.

externalUsername.description: Username on the external service (Last.fm / ListenBrainz). Null for Teal.fm.

hasCredentials.description: True when an API key is stored. Last.fm/ListenBrainz only; always false for Teal.fm.

lastPolledAt.description: The last time the mirror process successfully polled this source.

lastScrobbleSeenAt.description: Watermark — scrobbles from the external service older than this are skipped.

mbid.description: The MusicBrainz ID of the song.

isrc.description: The International Standard Recording Code (ISRC) of the song.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Spotify track.

previewUrl.description: A URL to a preview of the track.

id.description: The unique identifier of the artist.

picture.description: The picture URL of the artist.

The unique identifier of the album.

trackUri.description: AT-URI of the track record, used to build a clickable link to the song page.
